race.comment: FACTUALLY (12) deserves a change of luck after three second placings from four runs this time in and most of those events have been stronger contests than what she meets here. Has been scratched a few times of late with connections probably looking for the right contest and while she's drawn terribly, she won't find a more winnable 0-56. COOL THE JETS (2) comes across from SA and while that form is normally a rung below Victoria, it might not be the case here so he can measure up. BECAUSEYOU'RE MINE (1) looks out of form on paper but got the ratings drop required last start to make him eligible for this, which is the easiest race he's contested in a while. He can bounce back. SPINHOF (14) has been running well without winning of late but was beaten just over a length last start and draws to again be a player. OVER SHADY (8) is yet to miss a place in four first-up runs and did win a recent trial.
